kept.text: 因低级的配置失误，德国顶级域名 DE 在昨天夜里出现大范围访问中断，根源是轮换 DNSSEC 密钥时发布格式错误的签名导致 DNSSEC 无法正常解析。Cloudflare 监测到异常后立即禁用 1.1.1.1 针对 DE 域名的 DNSSEC 验证，不过其他 DNS 未禁用验证所以还是出现海量无法访问的情况：https://t.co/WX8OifNZZj https://t.co/kxkC0m9AC3

At the AI Special Session of Consensus 2026 in Miami, Pi Network took center stage, leading top experts from Coinbase, GoKiteAI, Cloudflare, and other industry giants in an explosive gathering. They clashed fiercely around the “Trillion-Dollar Agentic Payments Framework”!

With Carole House at the helm as moderator, the atmosphere was electric and full of tension. Burning questions filled the air: How can AI Agents make secure payments? Who will dominate the next generation of financial infrastructure?

Real-time opinions from industry leaders scrolled across the massive screens, while the audience below frantically held up their phones to capture every second. The air was thick with the electric mix of tension and excitement — the feeling that the future was being rewritten right before their eyes.

The door to the trillion-dollar track has been slammed open. At this very moment, the deep fusion of blockchain and AI has truly ignited!

Let the pioneers tell the world the right answer!

@PiCoreTeam @BSCNews @PiNewsMedia

Supabase = backend (Free)
Vercel = deploying (Free)
Namecheap = domain ($10/yr)
Stripe = payments (2.9% transaction)
GitHub = version control (Free)
Kit = emails (Free)
Clerk = auth (Free)
Cloudflare = DNS (Free)
Marketing = X (Free)
Search Console = SEO (Free)
GA4 = analytics (Free)

Monthly cost to run a startup = $20.

However, cost can increase depending on your niche...

kept.text:
Modern startup starter pack:

GitHub — code + version control (free)
Claude — coding copilot ($20/mo)

Namecheap — domain ($12/yr)
Cloudflare — DNS + protection (free)
Vercel — deploy globally (free)

Clerk — authentication (free)
Supabase — backend + Postgres (free)

Upstash — Redis + queues (free)
Pinecone — vector search (free)

Resend — transactional emails (free)
Stripe — payments (takes a cut)

PostHog — analytics (free)
Sentry — error monitoring (free)

Total startup cost = one Netflix subscription

No office.
No servers.
No investors.

Just shipping ideas from your bedroom.
